summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM system Phase 1 features. All 22 backend API tests passed - verified authentication protection (401 responses for unauthenticated requests) across all CRM endpoints. Frontend CRM login page renders correctly with Google Auth button, and dashboard properly redirects to login when not authenticated.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed invalid eslint rule 'react-hooks/set-state-in-effect' to 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' in CRMDashboard.jsx (lines 748 and 906) - this was causing frontend compilation errors
test_credentials: N/A - CRM uses Emergent Google OAuth
seed_data_creation: None - tests verify 401 responses for unauthenticated access
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Phase 1 implementation verified. All protected endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests. Login page at /crm/login renders with Google Auth button. Dashboard at /crm redirects to login when not authenticated. Public endpoints (/api/contact, /api/booking) still work. To test authenticated flows, would need to implement test user authentication via Emergent OAuth.

frontend_tests: Google Auth button visible with correct text
CRM Dashboard redirects to login when unauthenticated
